stemHtml: Which of the following is a description of a conventional non-precision approach in its most basic form that uses only ground-based facilities as reference? A non-precision approach has lateral...

options.a: Guidance referenced from a facility such as VOR and vertical guidance from the aircraft FMS.
options.b: And vertical guidance referenced from facilities such as ILS, MLS and GLS.
options.c: Guidance only that may be referenced from a localiser or a VOR.
options.d: And vertical guidance provided by an FMS.
